title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 14 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 14 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 14 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the Dalian Commodity Exchange iron ore futures experienced a decline in the morning session, followed by a rebound duringthe afternoon trading period. The most active I2609 contract closed at 758.5 RMB per tonne, reflecting a marginal decrease of 0.07 per cent from the previous trading session. Physical spot prices declined by 2 to 4 RMB per tonne compared to the prior day.
